claude_reason: MEP trade permit naming a plumbing contractor (Lecea Plumbing) indicates a plumbing trade permit, not unknown.

Permit type 'Residential Repair Permit' is informative; general repair of an existing residential structure fits residential_remodel.
Permit type 'Right of Way Management' clearly indicates right-of-way work even with empty description.
admin_licensing explicitly covers inspections-only records; 'Inspection Reports' type is informative.
Inspection-only record; admin_licensing explicitly covers inspections-only records
Geotech borings explicitly located in the public ROW; rule 8 routes right-of-way excavation to row_utility
